seoTitle: Gamma Capital Membership - Private Discord Community
seoDescription: Join a private environment dedicated to actionable insights, options flow interpretation, and structured market guidance.
heroTitle: Premium Discord Access for Serious Market Participants
heroDescription: Join a private environment dedicated to actionable insights, options flow interpretation, unusual activity monitoring and structured, real-time market guidance — without noise, hype or confusion.
insideSectionTitle: What You Will Find Inside the Discord
insideSectionDescription: The Gamma Capital Discord is designed for investors who want real clarity in fast-moving markets. Inside the private channels you will find:

insideFeatures.text: Real-time monitoring of institutional flows and unusual options activity
Daily market analysis on key U.S. equities and macro drivers
Fast alerts on anomalous moves and high-potential setups
Private discussions within a high-quality community of motivated members
Educational material, including introductory modules on options and flow interpretation

keyBenefits.title: Structured Insights
keyBenefits.description: Receive disciplined, well-organized market insights — not noise or speculation.

keyBenefits.title: Early Information Advantage
keyBenefits.description: Monitor institutional behavior and unusual activity before the majority of retail traders even notice.

keyBenefits.title: A Clean, Serious Community
keyBenefits.description: A curated space for investors who want focus, clarity and real analysis.

keyBenefits.title: Educational Foundation
keyBenefits.description: Access introductory material that helps you understand options, flows and smart money logic.

keyBenefits.title: Proven Methodology
keyBenefits.description: The same analytical approach used in our consulting work — adapted for daily operational use.

includedFeatures: Access to all private Discord channels
Real-time monitoring of institutional options flow
Daily commentary on high-impact market events
Fast alerts on unusual activity and high-potential setups
Automatic Premium role assignment after purchase
educationalItems: how to operate with smart-money logic
includedTagline: Everything is designed to support your decision-making with clarity and focus.
pricingSectionDescription: All plans include the full premium experience. The only difference is the duration.

plans.name: Monthly Plan
plans.description: Best for testing the community and its value.

plans.name: Quarterly Plan
plans.description: Saves money compared to the monthly plan.

plans.name: Annual Plan
plans.description: The best value for dedicated members.

plans.name: Black Label — Monthly
plans.description: Access to real-time options flow with algorithmic scoring. Bot-powered alerts on every significant move — filtered and instant.

plans.name: Black Label — Quarterly
plans.description: Access to real-time options flow with algorithmic scoring. Bot-powered alerts on every significant move — filtered and instant.

plans.name: Black Label — Annual
plans.description: Access to real-time options flow with algorithmic scoring. Bot-powered alerts on every significant move — filtered and instant.

accessSteps.title: Select Plan
accessSteps.description: Select the plan you prefer and complete the checkout via Stripe.

accessSteps.title: Activation
accessSteps.description: Your Premium role on Discord is activated automatically.

accessSteps.title: Access
accessSteps.description: You gain instant access to all private channels and educational materials.

accessSteps.title: Freedom
accessSteps.description: At expiration, you can renew or cancel freely — your role adjusts accordingly.

accessTagline: No friction, no manual steps, no waiting.

faqs.question: Do I need trading experience to join?
faqs.answer: Basic market knowledge helps, but the community is designed to be accessible even for investors who are still learning.

faqs.question: Are signals provided?
faqs.answer: No. We offer structure, context and strategic insights — not blind trade calls.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can cancel at any moment; access remains valid until the end of your billing cycle.

faqs.question: How do free trials work?
faqs.answer: You get full access during the trial period. If you cancel before it ends, you will not be charged.

faqs.question: What markets do you focus on?
faqs.answer: Primarily U.S. equities, options and flow-based market signals.

faqs.question: What is the Black Label tier?
faqs.answer: Black Label gives you access to real-time options flow with algorithmic scoring. Every significant market move is detected and notified instantly by our bot, using the same filters we have refined over years of monitoring.

comingSoonDescription: Gamma Capital constantly evolves. New tools and channels will be added progressively, including:
comingSoonNote: Premium members will receive access automatically as these features roll out.
finalCtaDescription: Gain clarity, structure and early insight in markets that reward prepared investors.
